heading: Prohibition of evictions
label: 13616 Prohibition of evictions
text: Any tenant who, except for reservation of a percentage of the units of a project pursuant to or any preference for occupancy established pursuant to this subchapter, is lawfully residing in a dwelling unit in a covered section 8 housing project, may not be evicted or otherwise required to vacate such unit because of the reservation or preferences or because of any action taken by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development or the owner of the project pursuant to this subchapter.section 13612 of this title
notes: References in TextCovered section 8 housing, referred to in text, is defined in .section 13619 of this title
